title: More than a deal.
It's about
moving forward.
paragraphs: Buying, selling, or renting a home is never only a transaction. It's about where your life is going next — and who you trust to guide you there.
Vamar pairs you with an expert UAE agent who listens first, knows the market, and stays with you from the first viewing to the keys in your hand.

under one roof.

heavyAssets.note: Every client works with one accountable agent backed by the full Vamar team — legal, mortgage, and handover support included, with no hidden fees.

title: Real estate,
rewired.
rewiredSteps.lead: Property in the UAE shouldn't feel like a guessing game. We've stripped it back to three simple steps, so you always know what's happening and what comes next.

steps.title: Talk to a real agent.
steps.body: Tell us what you're looking for — area, budget, timing, the must-haves. We match you with an agent who actually works that market, not a call centre.

steps.title: Get clarity, not pressure.
steps.body: Honest advice on price, neighbourhoods, mortgages, and paperwork. We show you the trade-offs so you can decide with confidence, never in a rush.

steps.title: Move forward.
steps.body: We handle the viewings, negotiation, contracts, and DLD transfer end to end — and stay on hand long after you've moved in.

title: Local experts who
know every street,
not just every listing.
founders.subtitle: Vamar agents are UAE specialists who live and work in the communities they sell — so the advice you get is grounded in the market, not a brochure.

members.name: Abdullah Al Naqbi
members.quote: My job isn't to sell you a property. It's to help you make the right move — even if that means telling you to wait. Get that right and the rest takes care of itself.
members.bio: Abdullah specialises in residential sales across Dubai — from Downtown and Business Bay apartments to Arabian Ranches family villas. Clients come to him for straight answers on price, timing, and which communities genuinely fit how they live.

members.name: Salem bin Touq
members.quote: The UAE rewards people who buy with a plan. I help investors and tenants alike see the numbers clearly, so every decision holds up years later.
members.bio: Salem leads investment and leasing — off-plan opportunities, rental yields, and landlord representation across Dubai and Abu Dhabi. He qualifies the numbers before the emotion, so every deal makes sense on paper as well as in person.

title: Build your career.
Own your work.
ownersPitch.body: Vamar is built by agents, for agents. If you're a licensed UAE professional who wants real ownership, modern tools, and warm leads instead of cold scripts, let's talk.

title: Speak with a
real person.
talkToHuman.body: Reach out and a real Vamar agent gets back to you personally — usually within a day. We listen first, answer honestly, and tell you straight when something isn't the right fit.

title: Good to know,
before you start.
whyAccordion.subtitle: The questions buyers, sellers, and renters ask us most — answered plainly.

items.q: Do I pay Vamar a fee as a buyer or tenant?
items.a: Our fees are transparent and explained upfront before you commit to anything. Standard UAE agency commission applies on a successful sale or lease — no surprise charges, ever.

items.q: Can a foreigner buy property in the UAE?
items.a: Yes. Non-residents and residents can buy in designated freehold areas across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and other emirates. Your Vamar agent will walk you through eligibility, financing, and the full process.
We do. We work with trusted UAE banks and brokers to get you pre-approved and find competitive rates, so you can shop with a clear budget and move quickly when you find the right home.

items.q: Can you manage my property after I buy?
items.a: Yes. Our property management team handles tenants, rent collection, maintenance, and renewals — ideal for investors and overseas owners who want a hands-off, well-run asset.

items.q: I want to sell. How do you price my home?
items.a: We give you a realistic, data-backed valuation based on recent comparable sales and current demand in your community — not an inflated number to win the listing.

items.q: How fast can you find me a place to rent?
items.a: Often within days. Tell your agent your budget, area, and move-in date, and we'll line up viewings of properties that genuinely match — not whatever happens to be empty.

title: Guidance you can
actually trust,
every step of the way.
paragraphs: Most people only buy or sell a handful of times in their life. We do it every day — and we treat your move with the care we'd want for our own family.
That means honest advice over a quick commission, clear communication instead of jargon, and an agent who picks up the phone long after the deal is done.
It's a simple promise: do right by the client, and the business takes care of itself.

pillars.title: Expert local agents
pillars.body: Specialists who know your community, its prices, and its quirks inside out.

pillars.title: Clear, honest guidance
pillars.body: Straight answers on price, timing, and paperwork — no pressure, no spin.

pillars.title: End-to-end support
pillars.body: Viewings, mortgage, contracts, DLD transfer, and handover — all handled for you.

about.metaDescription: Vamar Real Estate — a full-service UAE brokerage for buying, selling, renting, and investing.
title: A modern UAE
brokerage, built
around you.
about.intro: Vamar Real Estate is a full-service brokerage helping people buy, sell, rent, and invest across the United Arab Emirates. We pair every client with an expert local agent and handle the whole journey — from the first search to the keys, and everything in between.
storyParagraphs: Too much of real estate is built around the deal instead of the person making it. We started Vamar to flip that — to make honest, expert guidance the default, not the exception.
Today our agents work across all seven emirates, but the promise is the same as day one: tell you the truth, do the work, and earn the next referral.

principles.title: The client comes first.
principles.body: We give the advice we'd give a friend — even when it means a smaller deal, or no deal at all today.

principles.title: Honesty over hype.
principles.body: Realistic valuations, clear costs, and straight talk on the trade-offs. No inflated numbers to win a listing.

principles.title: Local expertise.
principles.body: Our agents live and work in the communities they sell, so the advice is grounded in the real market.

principles.title: We stay in it.
principles.body: From mortgage to handover and long after, your agent is one message away — not gone the moment you sign.

team.metaDescription: Meet the expert UAE agents behind Vamar Real Estate.
title: Local experts,
not generalists.
team.intro: Every Vamar agent is a UAE specialist in their patch — sales, leasing, off-plan, or investment. Find the right person for your move and reach out directly.
team.more: More agents joining the Vamar team across the UAE soon.

paperwork.metaDescription: The documents involved in buying, selling, and renting property in the UAE — explained simply.
title: Every form,
made simple.
paperwork.intro: UAE property transactions involve paperwork between buyers, sellers, agents, banks, and the Dubai Land Department (or your emirate's authority). Here's what to expect, in order — and your Vamar agent prepares all of it with you.
paperwork.imageAlt: A clean desk with property documents and a pen

docs.label: Title Deed (Mulkiya / Oqood)
docs.note: Proof of ownership issued by the land department.

docs.label: Listing Agreement (Form A)
docs.note: The terms under which Vamar markets your property.

docs.label: Service Charges & NOC
docs.note: No Objection Certificate from the developer, plus settled service charges.

docs.label: Mortgage Pre-Approval
docs.note: From a UAE bank if you're financing the purchase.

docs.label: Proof of Funds
docs.note: Evidence you can complete the purchase.

docs.label: Buyer Agreement (Form B)
docs.note: Authorises Vamar to represent you as the buyer.

docs.label: Tenancy Contract
docs.note: The signed lease between landlord and tenant.

docs.label: Ejari Registration
docs.note: Official registration of the tenancy in Dubai.

docs.label: Security Deposit Receipt
docs.note: Typically 5% of annual rent for unfurnished homes.

docs.label: DEWA & Cooling Setup
docs.note: Utilities and district cooling activated in the tenant's name.

docs.label: Memorandum of Understanding (Form F)
docs.note: The signed sale agreement; deposit usually 10%.

docs.label: Manager's Cheques
docs.note: Cleared funds prepared for transfer day.

docs.label: DLD Transfer Appointment
docs.note: Title transferred at the Dubai Land Department or trustee office.

docs.label: New Title Deed
docs.note: Issued in the buyer's name on the day of transfer.

paperwork.ctaBody: Every transaction is a little different. Tell us where you are — buying, selling, or renting — and we'll send the exact checklist that applies to you.
